## Type of change

- [ ] 🧩 New addon
- [ ] 🧠 New bug pattern in existing addon

- [ ] 🌍 README translation

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages follow conventional commits (`feat(addons/X):`, `fix(scripts):`, etc.)
- [ ] If adding/modifying a bash script: `bash -n <script>` passes
- [ ] If adding addon: README.md follows existing format
- [ ] If adding bug pattern: includes Symptom + Cause + Fix + Real case
- [ ] If translating: file is `README.<lang-code>.md` and matches structure of existing README.md
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]` section
- [ ] No accidental SuperDB-specific references in agnostic files
